article.body_preview:
Khulna - The government has approved the commercial cultivation of vannamei shrimp -- also known as king prawn -- in Bangladesh.

The Ministry of Fisheries and Livestock approved the cultivation of vannamei shrimp in a letter to the Director General of the Fisheries Department on March 29. At the same time, guidelines for commercial shrimp cultivation in Bangladesh were provided.

The demand for vannamei shrimp in the global market is high as the price is lower than that of Bagda shrimp.

Bangla

llm_connections.evidence_quote: commercial production and export of Vanami shrimp can earn 3 to 4 billion US dollars in revenue
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article attributes multi‑billion dollar export revenue to national-level commercial production and export of vannamei shrimp, which directly pertains to the country's exports component of balance_of_trade.
